transfer.workflow.inputfilelocation.CfnA: Specifies the location for the file that's being processed.

transfer.workflow.inputfilelocation.EfsF.Description: Specifies the details for the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file that's being decrypted.

transfer.workflow.inputfilelocation.S3Fi.Description: Specifies the details for the Amazon S3 file that's being copied or decrypted.
